## Safety / Persistence Checklist

- [ ] I did not add network calls, telemetry, or cloud dependencies.
- [ ] I did not commit model files, generated binaries, caches, or secrets.
- [ ] If this touches Learn Mode, WAL, ZPM, pruning, or chat, I added focused tests.
- [ ] `NRL_SAFE_MODE=1` behavior remains intact where relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] README / docs updated if commands, env vars, or user-visible behavior changed.
